## Change

Describe the problem, the chosen boundary, and the validation performed.

## Provenance And Distribution Checklist

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit --signoff`).
- [ ] New source files have SPDX and `YAFVS-Derivation` markers.
- [ ] Adapted or translated material has exact `YAFVS-Source-Provenance`.
- [ ] New dependencies or vendored/generated material have reviewed licenses and provenance.
- [ ] No GPL-3.0/AGPL-3.0 code is linked into a GPL-2.0-only artifact.
- [ ] Required lockfiles, notices, source offer material, and artifact SBOM inputs are updated.
- [ ] Feed or intelligence data terms were reviewed separately from source-code licenses.
- [ ] The relevant focused tests and Quality Gate pass.
